summary: Forgot Password and Email Verification Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 3 wizard steps verified with proper UI elements and navigation. Password reset flow works end-to-end with MongoDB code storage and verification.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/auth/forgot-password correctly stores 6-digit code in password_resets collection with 15-min expiry
Same success message returned for existing and non-existing emails (prevents email enumeration)
POST /api/auth/reset-password validates code, checks expiry, resets password, marks code as used
POST /api/auth/send-verification and /api/auth/verify-email correctly require authentication (return 403 without token)
Registration endpoint stores verification code in email_verifications collection
Frontend ForgotPassword.jsx has proper 3-step wizard with all required data-testid attributes
GuardianLogin.jsx has Forgot Password link with data-testid='forgot-password-link'
Login routing works correctly: admin->admin, guardian/parent->portal, teacher->teacher-portal, brand_partner->brand-portal
ProtectedRoute uses localStorage fallback to prevent login cycling issue
seed_data_creation: Password reset codes are stored in password_resets collection, email verification codes in email_verifications collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forgot Password flow fully tested. Uses Resend email (TEST MODE - emails only sent to account owner). Codes stored in MongoDB collections: password_resets (15-min expiry) and email_verifications (30-min expiry). All backend APIs return proper status codes and error messages. Frontend wizard has 3 steps with proper validation for password length (min 6) and password confirmation matching.

frontend_ui_tests: Login page has Forgot Password link - PASSED
Forgot Password link navigates to /forgot-password - PASSED
Step 1: Email input, Send Reset Code button, Back to Login link - PASSED
Step 2: 6-digit code input, new password, confirm password, Reset Password button - PASSED
Step 2: Resend code link returns to Step 1 - PASSED
Invalid code shows error toast - PASSED

forgot_password_backend.POST /api/auth/forgot-password: PASSED - Stores 6-digit code, returns generic message
forgot_password_backend.POST /api/auth/reset-password: PASSED - Validates code, resets password, marks code used

email_verification_backend.POST /api/auth/send-verification: PASSED - Requires auth, stores code in DB
email_verification_backend.registration_sends_code: PASSED - Code stored in email_verifications on register

frontend_wizard.step_1_email_entry: PASSED - Email input with send button
frontend_wizard.step_3_success: PASSED - Success message + Go to Login button
frontend_wizard.navigation: PASSED - Back to Login, Resend code links work

login_routing.no_cycling: PASSED - localStorage fallback prevents login loop

ai_integration.note: Resend email is in TEST MODE - emails only sent to account owner's email. Codes are stored in MongoDB and can be read directly for testing.
